states.name: Grenzor
states.title: Scourge of the Hinterlands
states.description: Northerners warn travelers about the Grenzor, ancient beasts that must keep a fire burning deep in their hearts. They do so by devouring the warm, still beating hearts of others—the bigger the better. Though they prefer larger prey, when this becomes scarce, no living creatures, including people, are safe from them.

states.name: Grenzor
states.title: Scourge of the Hinterlands
states.description: Grenzor are known for grabbing travelers during snowstorms. Despite their size, they are surprisingly stealthy. As such, very little else is known about these predators, though they are commonly referenced in folklore of the north, including many stories to discourage children from misbehaving. When someone goes missing there, the locals automatically assume that they have fallen prey to a ravenous Grenzor.

states.name: Grenzor
states.title: Scourge of the Hinterlands
states.description: Despite the danger they pose, the Grenzor are deeply respected by inhabitants of the far north. They believe that during a Pandemonium, the Grenzor prey just as much on the Eternal's hordes as they do on innocent travellers, acting as guardians of the land against tides of demons and frenzied monsters. No one knows for sure if this really is the case, but it is true that the northeastern regions have suffered far less during prior Pandemoniums than other areas.
